title: eBay Doubles Down on Luxury Sector Despite Cudoni Shutdown
text: Cudoni, a luxury resale platform backed by eBay, announced its shutdown earlier this week, citing the economic climate as the reason for its unfeasible operations. This has raised concerns about eBay's potential to gain market share in the used luxury sector.

title: eBay To Award $500,000 to Boost Seller Success
text: 50 U.S. eBay small business sellers will receive a $10,000 grant to invest in their small business, plus technology to fuel their growth SAN JOSE, Calif. , April 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, eBay launches its 2023 Up & Running program—a series of annual grants that reward promising eBay small business sellers and give them the tools they need to bring their businesses to the next level.

title: Easyship strikes agreement to support eBay's new International Shipping program
text: Easyship, the New York- and Singapore-based startup that enables e-commerce sellers to integrate with more than 250 courier services, announced today it has expanded its partnership with eBay to support eBay International Shipping, a newly-launched program. This means that buyers can now access more regional and express shipping solutions for international destinations through eBay's platform.

title: eBay Expands Luxury Offering with New Brand Platform
text: "Certified by Brand" invites designers and brands to scale their resale efforts, and provides shoppers with access to an expanded selection of authentic luxury watches, handbags, and jewelry SAN JOSE, Calif. , April 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, eBay announces the launch of its new Certified by Brand program, partnering directly with brands to scale their presence in the secondary market, while providing shoppers access to a wider selection of coveted and collectible luxury goods.

title: eBay has investors sold on another quarterly earnings beat
text: eBay Inc (NASDAQ:EBAY) shares jumped in after-hours trading with the multinational eCommerce company's earnings again topping expectations in the first quarter. For the quarter ended March 31, 2023, eBay posted a profit of $600 million or adjusted earnings per share of $1.11, above the Street's expectation of $1.07 and eBay's guidance range of $1.05 to $1.09.

title: EBay stock jumps 4% as company swings to quarterly profit
text: Shares of eBay Inc. EBAY rallied more than 4% in the extended session Wednesday after the company swung to a quarterly profit and met Wall Street expectations for its sales. EBay earned $569 million, or $1.05 a share, in the first quarter, contrasting with a loss of $1.4 billion, or $2.28 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: EBay forecasts quarterly revenue above estimates
text: Ecommerce firm eBay Inc forecast second-quarter revenue above Wall Street estimates on Wednesday, on hopes that it would attract shoppers to its refurbished as well luxury offerings as inflation cools.

title: eBay Inc. Reports Better Than Expected First Quarter 2023 Results
text: Revenue of $2.5 billion, up 1% on an as-reported basis and up 3% on an FX-Neutral basis Gross Merchandise Volume of $18.4 billion, down 5% on an as-reported basis and down 2% on an FX-Neutral basis GAAP and Non-GAAP EPS per diluted share o f $1.05 and $1.11, respectively, on a continuing operations basis GAAP an d Non-GAAP operating margin of 22.2% and 29.6%, respectively Returned $384 million to shareholders in Q1, including $250 million of share repurchases and $134 million paid in cash dividends SAN JOSE, Calif. , April 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- eBay Inc. title: eBay expected to raise dividend alongside solid 1Q results
text: eBay is expected to post solid results for the first quarter when the eCommerce company reports after the market close on Wednesday, April 26. title: eBay Opens "The '85 Shop" Featuring the Greatest Collection of Original Air Jordan 1s Ever Assembled
text: Sneaker fans can now own the most iconic sneakers in basketball history SAN JOSE, Calif. , April 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, eBay announces the launch of The '85 Shop: a new retail pop-up store opening in Chicago that honors the birth of the Air Jordan 1 and its rise to dominance in the sneaker wars of the 1980s.
